Located in [[Eriadu City/Legends|Eriadu City]], the '''Eriadu Governor's Palace''' was be the home to both governmental power in [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]] and [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu's]] governor. This ziggurat-shaped building—somewhat similar to many [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Sith temple/Legends|Sith]] temples—was seemingly located near some sort of haven.<ref name="EGP" />

[[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] became "de facto" owner of this mansion by [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], when [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] made him full governor of the Seswenna Sector. He had previously been [[Lieutenant governor/Legends|Lieutenant governor]] and had lived in a [[Wilhuff Tarkin's mansion|different mansion]].<ref name="COD">''[[Cloak of Deception]]''</ref> When he became Tarkin's personal [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Calamarian]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] would perform most of the household duties in this luxurious hall.
